General.Name: Kasen International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Kasen International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in manufacturing and trading of upholstered furniture in the United States, the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Cambodia, Europe, and internationally. It operates through Manufacturing and Trading of Upholstered Furniture; Properties Development; Lands and Properties Development of Special Economic Zone in Cambodia; and Others segments. The company is involved in production and sale of sofas, dining chairs, and other furniture products; production of furniture and glass fiber reinforces plastic products; wood processing; property development; lands development; and energy activities. It also engages in catering and entertainment services; travel related services; property management services; tourism resort-related operations comprising water parks, hot spring resort, hotels, and restaurants, and others; and provision of technology and application services. Kasen International Holdings Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Haining, the People's Republic of China.
